message:
style(session): fix indentation in JSONL save and incremental append paths

Re-indent the full-save and incremental-append code blocks in
Session::save() from a deeply nested (32+ space) indentation to the
standard 4-space Rust style. The code was accidentally over-indented,
likely from a merge or rebase that shifted the entire block rightward.

No logic changes — this is purely a whitespace/formatting fix that
restores readability and makes future diffs on these save paths clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
